overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark grassy field at night using a flashlight to illuminate the path. The camera approaches an abandoned structure in the distance, with graphics indicating this is video game footage from a survival or horror title.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass along a dirt path, sweeping flashlight across the field

entered.detail: tall wild grass surrounding the dirt path on all sides
narrow dirt trail winding through the grassland
dark silhouette of trees on the horizon against the night sky
dark night sky with scattered clouds visible above

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through an open grassland field at night. The flashlight illuminates a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall grass, with a distant tree line visible on the horizon. The environment is empty and quiet, with only the natural vegetation and night sky visible.

events.description: abandoned wooden shed comes into view ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward toward the abandoned structure, flashlight now illuminating the building facade

entered.detail: small dilapidated wooden structure with dark opening, becoming visible in the flashlight beam
weathered wooden fence posts running parallel to the path on the left side

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues walking, an abandoned wooden shed emerges from the darkness ahead, illuminated by the flashlight. A weathered wooden fence becomes visible on the left side of the path. The camera steadily approaches the structure, which appears to be a small outbuilding or shed with an open doorway, while the distant tree line is now obscured by the approaching building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a desolate night landscape that shifts from an open grassland to the immediate presence of a derelict structure. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the darkness to illuminate a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall grass, with a distant tree line marking the horizon. As the camera advances, the open field begins to close in as a weathered wooden fence appears on the left side of the path. The scene then shifts focus toward an abandoned wooden shed that emerges from the gloom, its open doorway becoming the central point of interest. The camera steadily approaches the outbuilding, causing the distant horizon to disappear behind the weathered walls of the structure.
